ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "player_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile image */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the player */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* Name of the league the team participates in */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach managing the team */,
  "team_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "team_a_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team */,
  "team_b_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team */,
  "score_a" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score_b" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament in which the match was played */,
  "match_location" TEXT /* Specific location of the match (e.g., stadium name) */,
  "match_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "match_referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee officiating the match */,
  "match_weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_a_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_b_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the match */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player in the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the match */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "tournament_format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., knockout, round-robin) */,
  "tournament_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the tournament sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team managed by the coach */,
  "coach_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the coach */,
  "coach_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the coach's profile image */,
  "coach_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the coach */,
  "coach_achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player injured */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of recovery in days */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "injury_recovery_status" TEXT /* Current recovery status of the player (e.g., in recovery, fully recovered) */,
  "injury_doctor_name" TEXT /* Name of the doctor treating the injury */,
  "injury_treatment_details" TEXT /* Details of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player profile */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "player_social_media" TEXT /* Player's social media handles */,
  "player_preferred_foot" TEXT /* Player's preferred foot (for sports like soccer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_profiles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player being ranked */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "average_points" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was last updated */,
  "ranking_tournament_id" INTEGER /* Tournament ID for which the ranking is applicable */,
  "ranking_season_year" INTEGER /* Season year for which the ranking is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played in the season */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins in the season */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses in the season */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the season */,
  "total_minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total number of minutes played in the season */,
  "total_field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total number of field goals made in the season */,
  "total_field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total number of field goals attempted in the season */,
  "total_free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total number of free throws made in the season */,
  "total_free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total number of free throws attempted in the season */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rebounds in the season */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player attending the session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in minutes */,
  "focus_area" TEXT /* Focus area of the training (e.g., endurance, strength) */,
  "session_coach_id" INTEGER /* Coach who conducted the training session */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location where the training session took place */,
  "session_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity level of the training session (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_session_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)
